openingMessage: Failure is not fatal, but failure to change might be.
leadershipThought: Act like a professional at all times. Respect the environment. Be aware. Don't create distractions. Act like the person the client would want back tomorrow.

todaysChallenge: On your next job, identify the line of fire before anything moves.
todaysChallengeSubtext: Where is the pressure release path? Where is the swing radius? Where should no one stand? Name it before work starts.
